The '''[[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] HoloDroid''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] equipped with a [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojector]] and the ability of momentum. Similar to that of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Mechno-chair/Legends|mechno-chair]], the HoloDroid was used for intergalactic communication for important personnel.

==Appearances==
